items.name_cn:
C'EST DIOR Small Bag ❣️❣️❣️
This C'est Dior bag is a new arrival for Fall 2023, elegant and classic. Crafted from calfskin, it features a CD embossed logo on the front, showcasing Dior's craftsmanship. Bucket bag silhouette with CD Lock closure featuring a rotary letter D, securely holding daily essentials. Small size with top handle and detachable chain strap with adjustable leather band, can be carried by hand for a relaxed look.
CD Lock closure
Detachable chain strap with adjustable leather band
Top detachable leather handle
Model: 2272
Size: 17×7×18cm
